name: Technetium Tc-99m tilmanocept
description: Technetium Tc-99m tilmanocept is a radiopharmaceutical diagnostic imaging agent approved by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) for the imaging of lymph nodes.
indication: Used diagnostically for the imaging of lymph nodes.

interactions.name: Lidocaine
interactions.description: Lidocaine may decrease effectiveness of Technetium Tc-99m tilmanocept as a diagnostic agent.
